div.p: Stack-based VM operations mapped to register-based native code

ul.li: Jump offsets are relative to next instruction
Division clobbers rdx (high bits of dividend)
setcc writes only low byte; movzx extends to full register

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: add rax, rbx ; rax = a + b

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: sub rax, rbx ; rax = a - b

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: imul rax, rbx ; rax = a * b (signed)

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: ; quotient in rax, remainder in rdx

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: xor rdx, rdx ; zero high bits

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; a in rax, b in rbx

g.text: cmp rax, rbx ; set flags based on rax - rbx
movzx eax, al ; zero-extend to full register

text.tspan: ; a in rax, b in rbx
; set flags based on rax - rbx

g.text: cmp rax, rbx ; compare a - b
test rax, rax ; set ZF based on rax & rax

text.tspan: ; set ZF based on rax & rax

g.text: mov rax, imm64 ; 48 B8 xx xx xx xx xx xx xx xx
mov rax, imm32 ; 48 C7 C0 xx xx xx xx

text.tspan: ; 48 B8 xx xx xx xx xx xx xx xx

g.text: mov [rbp - 16], rax ; store to local slot 0
